title: Key Witness
writer: J. Donald Wilson, Edward Bock, Raymond L. Schrock
actors: John Beal, Trudy Marshall, Jimmy Lloyd
plot: Milton Higby, an inventor of gadgets that don't sell finds himself accused of a crime he didn't commit---the killing of a girl he had just met---, and takes to the open road with the police in close pursuit. In his travels, he stu...
